channel.title: Meta on Tyler Burleigh, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Meta on Tyler Burleigh, PhD

item.title: Hello blogdown
item.description: I like to reinvent my website from time to time. This means doing a “spring cleaning,” but also using the opportunity to try something new. I like to experiment with new designs, layouts, and software. I’ve been using R quite a lot lately, and for the sake of curiosity I’m trying to see how many different uses I can find for it. This time I decided to try using blogdown to run my site.
